text:
Oh, sorry for my faulty problem report!


Subject must be "New Port: games/uclient"

and Description " UClient is a 2D isometric WorldForge game client, that 
uses libuta, SDL, and libAtlas-C++. "


I forgott to change my "default" problem report-form. Sorry once more!

Olli
